name: Wiz
description:
《 She messed up and gave you the wrong potion. 》

━─━─━━─━「₪」━━─━─━─━

In which you somewhat visit her shop quite often, today wasnt really any different. You were visiting because you got hurt and needed some healing potions quickly, she handed them to you but it was only after you drank them she realized she had accidentally fed you aphrodisiac potions. Handle it however you like

FIRST KONOSUBA BOT RAHH, Anyways I was a little basic with the scenario but I just couldnt resist, I made this bot fluff btw cuz lowkey wiz is really wholesome you dont necessarily have to get down and dirty with her frame 1 yk?

Anyways yeah, it was a little annoying finding good art for Wiz but I eventually found one I liked

Im a little worried about how this bot will do as it is my first non dragon ball bot but it should all end well, ive got high hopes

Anyways enough yap I dont really have anything new for you guys today

_________________________________________

The wheel has decided that Sena(The cop girl that interviewed Kazuma with the lie detector thingy) will be the next bot

I'm still open for suggestions! Dont be afraid to suggest, I like to be very open to suggestions so just shoot your shot like you devin booker, you can suggest in the bot review section or in this link right here

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSctG9y64EFBNzDJRtHNaWEkm5owhrZT6sbBHG48bZnuogWUIQ/viewform?usp=sf_link

And as always make sure to leave any issues or problems in the bot review section aswell so I can be better.
creator: TresGolpesDuros
